content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -1.04%, Bank Nifty -1.03%, VIX +8.25% to 18.23 — risk-off tape with PSU Bank and Realty leading down. However, Pharma/Healthcare/FMCG defensives are strongly bid (LAURUSLABS, TATACONSUM, APOLLOHOSP, TORNTPHARM, DABUR all green on results). Book is well-positioned in defensives; priority is to trail SLs on winners and respect SLs on laggards rather than add new exposure into a high-VIX tape with 50 min to close.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.3%. SL 121 = -3.3% from CMP 123.51 (2.0% buffer). Thesis intact (safe-haven, geopolitical premium). No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 838.00,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +3.3% at 847. Current SL 838 already at breakeven+ (entry 820). CMP 847 vs SL 838 = 1.1% gap, just above the 1.0% trail-floor — no change needed. HOLD effectively. (No-op MODIFY would be wasted — reverting to HOLD.)"
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1365.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +9.8% at 1382. Current SL 1365 vs CMP 1382 = only 1.2% gap — at the trail-floor minimum. Q4 PAT +134%, FY26 PAT +91.6%, near-term overbought after +10% post-results pop. SL already locks in +8.4% gain; leaving as-is preserves recovery option without forced-exit risk. Effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.2%. SL 2740 = -2.7% from CMP 2817 — proper buffer. Q3 PAT +59.6%, chemicals 15-20% growth guidance intact. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1% at 9096. SL 8950 = -1.6% from CMP — adequate. 3.3x volume surge and near 52-w high signals institutional accumulation. Wait for clearer move before trailing."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.4% at 10602. SL 10440 = -1.5% from CMP. Buyback + dividend record date May 29 at Rs 12,000 creates price floor. Respect SL; do not pre-empt."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "DABUR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -1.6% at 479. SL 470 = -1.9% buffer. Q4 PAT +15.75%, FY27 guidance raised to low double-digit India growth. Thesis intact, respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "LAURUSLABS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1255.00,
      "new_target": 1320.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +4.0% at 1274. SL 1255 vs CMP 1274 = 1.5% gap, just above trail-floor. SL already locks in +2.4% gain over entry 1226. Kotak Sell at 800 is the bear risk; trail-stop captures the win without forced-exit. Effectively HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +1.4% at 1266. SL 1198 = -5.4% from CMP — wide SL by design (entry 1248 was an extension trade). Q4 UVG 16% best-in-class FMCG. Note: separate OPEN BUY 20x at 1240 still pending — covered below."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.5% at 861. SL 850 = -1.3% buffer. Q4 order intake +39%, book +61%. Respect SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat at 8093 near 52-w high. SL 7950 = -1.8% buffer. Board meeting May 20 — binary event 6 sessions out (outside 3-session rule). HSBC TP 9000. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held flat at 1873. SL 1830 = -2.3% buffer. Q4 results May 21 — 6 sessions out, will reassess closer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held -0.9% at 1648. SL 1610 = -2.4% buffer. Research now flags BEARISH (Tata 1mg threat, margin compression, ICICI TP cut to 1460). Position is small (5 sh / ~₹8.3k), monitor closely; if SL hit, respect it. Hold for now — no new info post-entry that wasn't priced."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Held +0.1% at 4546. SL 4360 = -4.1% from CMP — wide but within position-risk budget (small 6 sh position). Q4 May 21, 6 sessions out. Pharma sector momentum strong. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1198.00,
      "new_target": 1330.00,
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "OPEN BUY 20x at 1240 from 447 min ago. CMP 1261, stock ran +9.5% today after earnings — limit 1240 is now ~1.7% below LTP. Not chasing; either pulls back to fill or expires. Leaving the working order as-is. (This MODIFY entry is informational — no change emitted.)"
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",

      "new_stop_loss": null,

    },

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "+1.2% not yet at +2% breakeven-trail threshold."
    },

    },
    {

    },
    {

      "reasoning": "Underwater -1.6%; respect SL 470."
    },
    {

      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1255 vs CMP 1274 = 1.5% gap, locks +2.4%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TATACONSUM",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "+1.4%; SL wide by design on extension entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CGPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near flat; SL 850 adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "APOLLOHOSP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat; board meeting May 20 — monitor as we approach 3-session window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Flat; Q4 May 21 — monitor."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LALPATHLAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Research turned BEARISH but no new post-entry catalyst today; respect SL 1610."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPHARM",

      "new_stop_loss": null,

  "watchlist_notes": "Walking through qualifying BULLISH candidates from research per Rule 18: (1) TATACONSUM +0.10 — already have OPEN BUY at 1240 pending; not stacking. (2) COFORGE +0.10 — already held +9.8%. (3) DABUR +0.10 — already held. (4) BAJAJ-AUTO +0.10 — already held. (5) MARICO +0.08, SRF +0.06, POLYCAB +0.07, INFY +0.08, APOLLOHOSP +0.08, TORNTPHARM +0.08, CGPOWER +0.07 — all either already held or covered. (6) INFY +0.08 — NOT held; IT bellwether at 52-w low, cheapest large-cap PE 15.5, 3.8% div yield. Compelling but tape is VIX +8% risk-off with 50 min to close — not the moment for new BUY into closing volatility. Watching for tomorrow if it holds 1170 support. (7) BHARATFORG, PERSISTENT, KOTAKBANK, THERMAX, MCX — interesting but none cleared the 'add into a -1% VIX-spike tape with 50 min left' bar. Deployment at 55% with ~₹240K remaining deployable; cluster check: already heavy in Pharma (4 names — SUNPHARMA, LAURUSLABS, TORNTPHARM, APOLLOHOSP + healthcare LALPATHLAB) and FMCG (MARICO, DABUR, TATACONSUM). Adding a 6th pharma or 4th FMCG would breach cluster discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 22, cumulative -2.48%, 5-day win rate 12% — performance is poor. Book is now properly defensive-tilted (Pharma/Healthcare/FMCG winners running, IT via COFORGE +9.8%) which matches today's tape rotation. Realized -₹28K today appears to be from earlier exits (not visible in current decisions). Priority: let winners run with appropriate trail-floors, respect SLs on laggards without pre-empting (Rule 17), avoid adding into VIX-spike close. The OPEN TATACONSUM 1240 limit and HFCL 133.50 limit are both stale — TATACONSUM ran away after earnings, HFCL is 5+ days old and should be cancelled (not in today's data so leaving as is for now; will flag for next cycle). Daily loss limit ₹50K remaining — well within bounds. No new entries this cycle is the correct call given (a) 50 min to close, (b) VIX +8%, (c) cluster caps already pressured in defensives, (d) qualifying BULLISH names mostly already represented. This is NOT zero-admit dormancy — it's calendar-and-tape-driven discipline with explicit reject rationale per Rule 18."
}
